title: Cannabis licensing application: Cultivation, processing and sale for medical purposes - Canada.ca
content:
## Cannabis licensing application: Cultivation, processing and sale for medical purposes licence
Anyone who wants to do activities with cannabis must get a licence from  Health Canada. For example, if you want to grow cannabis, make cannabis  products or sell cannabis for medical purposes. Use these pages to apply for  the following commercial cannabis licences under the Cannabis Regulations :
- micro-cultivation, nursery and standard cultivation
- micro-processing and standard processing
- sale for medical purposes
Not all types of cannabis licences are included in these pages. For  other licences, refer to:
- Application for a cannabis drug  licence
- Industrial hemp licensing  application guide
- Application requirements for a cannabis research licence
- Application requirements for  a cannabis analytical testing licence
